description: List of names, possibly a communal register fragment. Dated 5536 AM (1775/76 CE). Many of the names feature the Ben-____ construction surname. Some of the names are repeated across both sides of the bifolio (indicated by asterisk*): Avraham Ḥazīza[?]*, Aharon Ben-Mshāsh, Shelomo Asūlīn, Aharon Ben-Aḥna[?], Yiṣḥaq Afrīyāṭ*, Efrayim Asūsī, Avraham Ben-Susan, Maymūn Azūlay, Avraham b. Yosef ha-Kohen, Yiṣḥaq b. Yaʿacov Laredo, Shemuʾel Mīyada, Moshe Ben-Aḥna[?], Yeshūʿa Ben-Harās[?] // left side of bifolio // Ḥayyīm Ben-Saʿadūn, Mes. Ben-Zāzōn, Beriya[?] Ben-ʿAmrām, Yosef ha-Kohen, Mes. Ben-Lvāz, Moshe Ben-Saʿadūn, Makhlūf ha-Kohen, Reʾuven Asūlīn, Yaʿacov Ben-Simḥon, Daniʾel Ben-ʿAmrām, Mordukh Ben-Alḥazan, Avraham al-Qūrqī, Shalom Ben-Simḥōn, Ṣadōq Ben-Zāzōn, Avraham Ben-Alḥazan. MCD.
description_he: רשימת שמות, ייתכן קטע מפנקס קהילתי. תאריך: 5536 לבריאה (1775/76 לספירה). רבים מהשמות נושאים שם משפחה מהסוג 'בן-____'.
